statement: In every magma, Equation 3454 (`x * y = z * (w * (u * u))`) implies Equation 4503 (`x * (y * y) = (z * w) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0002
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x y) = (op z (op w (op u u)))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x (op y y)) = (op (op z w) z)
